details.test: Task 1: Create email reminder for earliest morning show (schedule + reminder)
Task 2: Save three free station-sponsored April 2026 events to My Events
Task 3: One-time $25 donation to Music Programs (donation flow)
Task 4: Add newest local news episode to listening queue
Task 5: Submit free neighborhood concert to community bulletin
Task 6: Submit song request for Morning Mix
Task 7: Apply as Street Team volunteer with evening availability
Task 8: Create weekly listening plan by favoriting three shows
Task 9: Subscribe to weekly newsletter (Live Events + New Music Releases)
